untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit volatility percentile calculations (10th/90th percentile of historical range) and mean-reversion confirmation logic that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators. hvol_20 is the closest available volatility measure but does not provide percentile rankings or confirmation bar counting required by the original rule. Entry thresholds, lookback_period_days, and confirmation_bars are marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] in source and cannot be inferred.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using hvol_20 as volatility proxy: extreme lows (<10) for long entry, extreme highs (>90) for short entry, with reversion target at median (50). However, this lacks the percentile-based logic, confirmation period enforcement, and historical range normalization specified in the original Natenberg rule. Manual parameter tuning required to map percentile thresholds to hvol_20 scale.
